======= RMA03367Cornell clippings file13-8-3367Compiled by Uris Library StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
August 17, 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:03:42 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell clippings file
Cornell University. Library
13-8-3367
7 cubic feet. 7 cubic feet.
1940-1989. News clippings, indedex cards Cornell related clippings from the Cornell Daily Sun, the Ithaca Journal, the Cornell Chronicle, and the Ithaca Times, organized by subject headings and including a card index. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 10 ======= 10 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 5128041
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Uris Library Staff
Date completed:
1989
EAD encoding:
Peter Martinez, August 2004
Date modified:
RMC staff, October 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Cornell related clippings from the Cornell Daily Sun, the Ithaca Journal, the Cornell Chronicle, and the Ithaca Times, organized by subject headings and including a card index.
NOTES
See also Cornell University News Service records, #4-3-15: http://resolver.library.cornell.edu/cgi-bin/EADresolver?id=RMA00015.
Cite As:
Cornell clippings file, #13-8-3367. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Ithaca times. Ithaca journal (Ithaca, N.Y. : 1872). Cornell chronicle. Cornell daily sun. Cornell University -- : Students. Cornell University -- : Faculty. Cornell University -- : Employees. Cornell University -- : History. Cornell University -- : Publicity. Cornell University -- : Buildings.
